title: aster hybernus
intro: Aster hybernus, also known as Frost Aster or Wood's Aster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aster hybernus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Aster hybernus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
